---
title: "agent_loop.test.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/node/agent_loop.test.ts"
loc: 111
complexity: 10
logic_score: 3.95
style_score: 3.88
intel_score: 5.36
overall_score: 4.30
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 17 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [test](file://node:test)
- [describe](file://node:test)
- [it](file://node:test)
- [mock](file://node:test)
- [beforeEach](file://node:test)
- [afterEach](file://node:test)
- [assert](file://node:assert)
- [*](file://node:fs/promises)
- [executeCycle](file://../../src/node/agent_loop.js)

### Exports
- `mockReadFile`
- `mockWriteFile`
- `loggedMessages`
- `loggedErrors`
- `MockCortexLink`
- `cortexLink`
- `mockFnDeploy`
- `output`
- `cortexLink`
- `mockFnDeploy`
- `errorOut`
- `cortexLink`
- `mockFnDeploy`
- `output`
- `cortexLink`
- `mockFnDeploy`
- `output`
